description_long: This object consists of two ornate swords or daggers, each with a distinct design. The upper blade is dark with a subtle reddish pattern, a simple rounded pommel, and a straight crossguard, giving it a mysterious, almost ceremonial appearance. The lower blade is silver with a twisted, spiral handle, a rounded pommel featuring a decorative motif, and a crossguard with elegant curves. Both blades are straight and taper to a sharp point, with the lower one displaying intricate engravings along the blade and handle. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with the lower handle possibly wrapped or textured for grip. These weapons are visually striking and would stand out in an urban context as decorative or collectible items.
description: A pair of ornate, straight-bladed swords or daggers—one dark with red accents, the other silver with a spiral, decorated handle and engraved blade.
description_view_0: Side view showing both blades in full length, highlighting the dark blade's subtle red pattern and the silver blade's ornate handle and engravings.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the crossguards and pommels, with the spiral handle and decorative motif on the silver blade clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the profile of both blades, with the silver blade's twisted handle and the dark blade's simple form.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the pommels and the curvature of the crossguards, with the decorative details on the silver handle most prominent.
attribute_handle_design: twisted spiral grip with decorative pommel and crossguard; simple rounded handle on dark blade
attribute_ornamentation: engraved blade, decorative pommel, spiral handle, red pattern on dark blade
